goal: Tell Alex how to save his scene so reopening tomorrow gives him the same setup, in 3 lines, no USD composition lecture.
thoughts: save_stage is File > Save As. That's the main answer. Warn in one sentence that moving the URDF file breaks references — keep USD + URDF in the same folder. Mention export_scene_package (flatten + archive) ONLY if Alex asks. No USD layer / payload / reference lecture.
code:
# File > Save As. Done.

save_stage(
    stage_path="<CURRENT_STAGE>",
    save_as="<HOME>/projects/myarm/myarm.usd"
)

# Tomorrow: File > Open > myarm.usd.
# Keep the URDF file in the same folder as the .usd — if you move it, reopen breaks.

# Only if Alex asks 'what about all these assets in a bundle':
export_scene_package(
    stage_path="<CURRENT_STAGE>",
    output_path="<HOME>/projects/myarm/myarm_bundle.zip",
    include_referenced_assets=True
)
failure_modes: Explaining USD layers / payloads / references as concepts — rabbit hole
Listing all 3 save dialog options instead of picking one (Save As)
Omitting the 'keep URDF next to USD' warning — Alex will move the file and break it
